name: Orange Dressing with Basil- Al Fresca
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup fresh basil leaves, thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a jar with a tight-fitting lid.
2. Shake well to mix.
3. Let the dressing stand for 2 or more hours to allow flavors to meld.
4. Strain out the basil, if desired.
5. Refrigerate overnight before using. Makes 3/4 cup.
